name: GOLFTEC North Austin
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training and club fitting facility focused on data-driven improvement. It utilizes advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized feedback. The company offers golf lessons, club fitting services, and practice access through a network of centers with certified PGA instructors. Pricing is structured around lesson packages and memberships for bay access.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized improvement plan using data from launch monitors and video analysis
Access to a certified PGA coach for structured lesson and practice guidance
Comprehensive services including lessons, practice, and expert club fitting in one location

food_and_drink.notes: No food or beverages mentioned on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: SKYTRAK Launch Monitor mentioned for practice and fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC recommends bringing your own clubs. The facility also offers club rentals and custom club fitting services if you do not have your own set.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink to the venue?
faq.answer: No, the website does not mention bringing in outside food or drinks, and there are no on-site food or beverage services described.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for completing an 18-hole simulation. It emphasizes structured practice and lessons over casual play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly and suitable for juniors?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is suitable for juniors. The company offers instruction for all skill levels and specifically mentions junior golf programs and youth development through its network of certified coaches.
